name: Asparagus and Crabmeat Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 large Boston lettuce leaves - or butter lettuce leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, tomato paste, shallot, Dijon mustard, and pepper in a medium bowl. Cover and refrigerate until ready to use (can be prepared up to 3 days ahead).
2. Cook asparagus in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a bowl of ice water and cool. Drain and pat dry.
3. Mix crabmeat into the mayonnaise. Season to taste with salt.
4. Arrange one lettuce leaf on each plate. Top with asparagus. Spoon crabmeat mixture over and serve.
